finding_results.notes: Changed the taping-night expectation beat from Tuesday to Friday to match the continuity sheet and adjacent chapter timeline.

finding_results.notes: Replaced the laugh-correction beat so Doug stays literal and insurance-minded without echoing the style-bible calibration line about a joke versus a coverage gap.

finding_results.notes: Expanded the late performance so the post-boxes Holiday Inn/claims-classification beat visibly loses the room, while the post-Kelsey Civic beat lands and the sump-pump material continues under observable room attention.
finding_results.summary: The climactic back half now renders messy live material on the page instead of summarizing that it landed or drifted.

finding_results.notes: Doug now counts seven boxes onstage, matching the continuity sheet and the next chapter's physical description.

finding_results.notes: Cut the universalizing gloss after the boxes monologue and moved directly into concrete room silence and Doug's brief 'Yeah.'

summary: Revised Chapter 17 to restore Friday-night continuity, correct the seven-box second-bedroom inventory, remove the Simone calibration echo, and replace late-set summary drift with directly rendered post-boxes and post-Kelsey performance beats that visibly miss and land on the page.
